title: UniBond HK34179 No More Nails Invisible Mini Tube - 41 g, White
description: From the manufacturer UniBond No More Nails For more than 100 years, the Henkel family of brands have been world leaders in professional grade adhesives and sealants. But Henkel products aren’t just for professionals. Tried, tested and proven by millions of customers worldwide, Henkel branded products have become the number one choice for DIYers in and around the home. The UniBond No More Nails range is the ultimate tool to make DIY easier. The range consists of a variety of adhesives which will help you to complete a range of jobs both inside and outside the house. These high strength adhesives have superior grab strength and eliminate the need for nails, screws and plugs in many DIY and repair jobs. No More Nails products are available in Cartridges, Tubes, Mini Tubes, Strips, Rolls and the Easy Applicator. Why use UniBond No More Nails Invisible Mini Tube? UniBond No More Nails Invisible provides unparalleled support for heavier objects, is safe and easy to use and dries translucent. It is ideal for fixing skirting boards, coving, polystyrene mouldings, window ledges, coat hooks and many other internal bonding applications. Adheres to most building materials: wood, brick, polystyrene, plaster, stone, ceramic, concrete, metal and PVC. UniBond No More Nails Invisible Mini Tube is a handy size for smaller DIY and repair jobs. How to use UniBond No More Nails Invisible Mini Tube: 1) Ensure surfaces are clean, dry and free from loose material, dust, oil, grease and polish. When bonding at least one surface must be porous. 2) Remove protective cap. 3) For small items apply one or two beads to the back of the item and press into place. 4) For larger items, apply beads to one surface at 300mm intervals. 5) Immediately press the item into place with a twisting action. You can reposition the bond up to 5 minutes after application. 6) Wipe away excess and clean residues of adhesive with a damp cloth. 7) Allow 24 hours for adhesive to dry before subjecting to additional load depending on temperature and substrate. UniBond No More Nails range: The UniBond No More Nails Range consists of a variety of adhesives to complete a range of jobs both indoors and outdoors: - UniBond No More Nails Original Cartridge for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Original Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Original Mini Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Original Easy Applicator for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Cartridge for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Mini Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Easy Applicator for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Waterproof for indoor and outdoor use - UniBond No More Nails Permanent Roll for indoor and outdoor use - UniBond No More Nails Permanent Roll for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Permanent Strips for indoor and outdoor use - UniBond No More Nails Removable Strips for indoor and outdoor use
